PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: bumped casks for synckitd v0.9.0, ccx v0.14.0, cc-present v0.8.1, cc-notes v0.28.0, and cc-pool v0.52.1

PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: hardened the daemon for v9.9.0 — registry TOCTOU fixes, peer-uid/run-dir trust checks, in-flight request preservation

PushEvent:yasyf/synckit.summary: added a self-healing recursive fsnotify watch backend with supervised, backoff-restarted watches

PushEvent:yasyf/getaway.summary: rewrote getaway as a v2 uv CLI — a doctrine-driven planning engine over data registries — and cut 1.0.0

PushEvent:yasyf/experiment-at-home.summary: new experiment-at-home toolkit — closed Phase A security & correctness findings and drafted the Phase B API spec

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: built the hermes disk image with systemd-repart (KVM-less CI) and swapped the MLX daemon to rapid-mlx 0.10.9

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-present.summary: built focus mode — a one-decision-at-a-time card deck with swipe-to-decide, at parity across web and iOS

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: routed bounded work to gpt-5.6-sol via the codex skill; quieted codex exec behind a non-improvisable scratchpad log

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: v0.14.0 — git-show flag-injection & SSRF fixes, a read-only ccx auto-approver, and tilth grep zero-match re-verification

spawnllm@v0.6.0.summary: file-backed claude stdout capture that fixes the 64KiB pipe truncation, plus retried-away attempt transparency

captain-hook@v9.9.0.summary: deny-wins dispatch precedence plus the attach-only pack contract — pack lint, versioned plugin, async-decision guard

cc-pool@v0.52.1.summary: fixed a lease-agent fd-3 crash by single-sourcing --ready-fd parsing; hid File Provider overlay domains from Finder

slop-cop@v0.1.41.summary: packs.toml — added the missing steering pack to match the go flavor

cc-guides@v0.1.21.summary: kind dirs at pack root only, case-folded README reservation, and import-name validation

cc-interact@v0.1.0.summary: initial release — the domain-agnostic agent ⟷ daemon ⟷ web framework extracted from cc-review
